bird.name: 花头鹦鹉
bird.summary: 花头鹦鹉（学名：Psittacula roseata）为鹦鹉科鹦鹉属的鸟类。分布于尼泊尔、不丹、印度、孟加拉、斯里兰卡、中南半岛以及中国大陆的云南、广西、广东等地，主要生活于低山及平原地带以及特别是耕地周围的林木。该物种的模式種在印度。 保护 中国国家重点保护动物等级：二级 亚…

locations.name: 东南亚
locations.summary: 东南亚（英語：Southeast Asia，缩写SEA），即華人傳統所稱之南洋，位于亚洲东南部，由中國以南、印度以東、新幾內亞以西與澳洲以北的多個國家、地區組成，是第二次世界大战后期才出现的地区名称。东南亚分為两個區域，陸域為中南半島，包…

locations.name: 泰国
locations.summary: 泰王国（泰語：ราชอาณาจักรไทย，皇家轉寫：Ratcha-anachak Thai），通稱泰国（泰語：ประเทศไทย，皇家轉寫：Prathet Thai），舊称暹罗（泰語：สยาม，皇家轉寫：Sayam），是东南亚的君主立宪…

relations.subject: 花头鹦鹉
relations.evidence: It has a lime green body and a pink or bluish grey-head and is found in Southeast Asia

relations.subject: 花头鹦鹉
relations.evidence: |date=2020 |title=Blossom-headed Parakeet (Psittacula roseata), version 1.0 |url=https://birdsoftheworld.org/bow/species/blhpar3/cur/introduction |journal=Birds of the World |language=en |doi=10.2173/bow.blhpar3.01 |issn=2771-3105|url-access=subscription }} The blossom-headed parakeet inhabits lowland and foothill open forests. It occurs in altitudes around 1500m and in light forests such as savannas, secondary growth forests, forest edges, clearings, and cultivated areas. In Thailand, the blossom-headed parakeet is common in cultivated land and forest outskirts

In Thailand, the blossom-headed parakeet is common in cultivated land and forest outskirts
relations.object_summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

relations.subject: 花头鹦鹉
relations.evidence: The blossom-headed parakeet was classified as near threatened by the IUCN Red List in 2013 because of its moderately rapid decline from trapping and habitat loss
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: 花头鹦鹉
relations.evidence: roseata in Kaziranga National Park, Northeast India (2020)]]The species is vulnerable to habitat loss especially in degraded lowland deciduous dipterocarp forests. Human pressures such as agricultural land conversion, hunting, and climate change increase disturbances to blossom-headed parakeet habitats
relations.object_summary: 长期改变水文节律与生态系统稳定性的全球变化因素。
